items.name: Gucci Queen Elizabeth Gorget x Achille Lauro (3.0)
items.description: Gorget detailed with a GG pattern that was worn on stage by Achille Lauro during the last night of Sanremo 2020 as he performed his song "Me ne frego." The item co-designed by Achille Lauro and Alessandro Michele pays homage to Queen Elizabeth Tudor I. Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 3.0 avatars woman/man.

items.name: Gucci Glam Rock Shoulder Pads x Achille Lauro 3.0
items.description: Shoulder pads detailed with interlocking G that were worn by Achille Lauro on stage during the first night of Sanremo 2021 as the artist paid homage to the cult of Glam Rock with a performance of his song "Siamo soli." Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 3.0 avatars woman/man.

items.name: SIUNES Graphic Zip Hoodie Ember Edition
items.description:
A bold cropped zip hoodie in deep ember brown, featuring signature SIUNES graphics, embroidered flame motifs, and vibrant branded detailing. The glossy finish and premium stitching create a high-end streetwear look that elevates any outfit. Artistic, edgy, and unmistakably SIUNES.

🔗 SIUNES: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=SIUNES&CreatorType=Group

items.name: Elton John - Tour Suit
items.description:
Feel like a million dollars in this expertly crafted, incredibly detailed suit made by UGC Creator @Soulskor in homage to the suits Elton John has worn on the Farewell Yellow Brick Road Tour. 

The suit comes with an Elton John Avatar Bundle and the look is completed with the Elton John Eyewear frames by @RynityRift and a pair of designer shoes.

All items can be removed from the Avatar body so that you can mix and match to create a style all your own.

items.name: Leather Satchel Bag With Straps
items.description:
Step out in style with the timeless Leather Satchel! Crafted with a classic design, this versatile bag exudes charm and practicality. Featuring detailed stitching, a secure flap closure, and adjustable straps, it's perfect for adventurers, scholars, or anyone on the go. Whether you're carrying ancient maps, rare artifacts, or just your essentials, this satchel adds a touch of vintage flair to any outfit.
